title: DataHacks26: Pycnocline Compression Mapping and Prediction
description: Processed 198K global Argo float profiles to map and predict changes in pycnocline-bounded marine habitable zones, training an XGBoost model (R² = 0.986) that identifies pycnocline depth as the dominant spatial driver of ocean habitat compression.

title: DiamondHacks26: AI Speech Coach
description: SmartIQ is an AI-powered communication tool designed to help users refine their verbal delivery and social interactions through real-time feedback and analysis.

title: DSC80: Power Outage Analysis
description: This project performs a comprehensive statistical and exploratory data analysis of major power outages in the United States to identify significant patterns, such as the relationship between specific causes and the severity or duration of the outages.

title: COGS108: Textile Environmental Impact Analysis
description: This project investigates the environmental impact of various textile categories (Plastic, Mixed, and Non-Plastic) through statistical analysis and machine learning, ultimately finding that material type alone does not meaningfully explain differences in greenhouse gas emissions, resource consumption, or waste generation.

title: CSE150A: Movie Recommendation System
description: This project implements a Hidden Markov Model (HMM) to analyze the movie industry's temporal evolution, identifying distinct 'regimes' (such as mainstream vs. indie eras) to predict movie characteristics and trends over time.
